name: philippines-ai-accounting
description: AI-enabled Philippine accounting system scaffold with BIR compliance and CAS-ready architecture.

scripts.build: npm --workspace backend run build && npm --workspace frontend run build
scripts.start:web: npm --workspace frontend run build && npm --workspace backend run build && cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm --workspace backend run start
scripts.lint: echo "Add lint scripts in workspace packages"
scripts.test: echo "Add unit tests for backend and frontend"
